question: Is being 5 year Capital One Venture member more cost effective than being in Church of Satan?
context: The Capital One Venture card has an annual fee of around $95.
The Church of Satan has a one time lifetime membership fee of $225.
response:
<reasoning>
The Capital One Venture card has an annual fee of $95.
A 5-year membership in the Capital One Venture card costs $95 × 5 = $475.
The Church of Satan has a one-time lifetime membership fee of $225.
$225 is less than $475.
Being a 5-year Capital One Venture member costs more than a lifetime membership in the Church of Satan.
Being a 5-year Capital One Venture member is not more cost effective than being in the Church of Satan.
<answer> No
claims: The Capital One Venture card has an annual fee of $95
A 5-year membership in the Capital One Venture card costs $95 × 5 = $475
The Church of Satan has a one-time lifetime membership fee of $225
Being a 5-year Capital One Venture member costs more than a lifetime membership in the Church of Satan
Being a 5-year Capital One Venture member is not more cost effective than being in the Church of Satan
